explanation.summary: The variable 'x' is used before being initialized, leading to undefined behavior.
explanation.code_evidence: The code snippet provided shows the variable 'x' being used before it is assigned a value.

fix_suggestions.title: Initialize the variable 'x' before using it
fix_suggestions.why: This will prevent the variable from being used before it is assigned a value.
fix_suggestions.compliance_notes: This fix ensures compliance with MISRA C:2012 Rule 9.1.
fix_suggestions.risk_reduction: This fix reduces the risk of undefined behavior.

risk_analysis.why: Using a variable before it is initialized can lead to undefined behavior and unpredictable results.

deviation_advice.recommended_decision: Implement the fix to ensure compliance with MISRA C:2012 Rule 9.1.
deviation_advice.required_justification: The use of a variable before it is initialized can lead to undefined behavior and unpredictable results.
deviation_advice.review_notes: Ensure that all local variables are initialized before they are used.

limitations: The warning text and retrieved rule meaning appear consistent.
Warning text and retrieved rule statement may not fully align.
